name: West Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Long-tenured Carbondale charter/school bus operator (since 1961); BBB indicates business may be out of business though directory listings still show active phone (2024-2025); SIU's Saluki Express transitioned to Jackson County Mass Transit in Aug 2024 (separate operator).
fit_notes: Small (~30 employees, ~$1.1M rev) southern Illinois operator with 60+ year history and family-led mgmt (Hale family) — classic succession profile if still operating. Verify active status before pursuing; downside is unclear current contract base.

name: All American Bus Co Inc
districts_or_customers: northern NJ (Passaic County) school and charter work — specific districts not disclosed
recent_news: Small Hawthorne, NJ school/charter bus operator owned by William Lees; no recent M&A or material news identified. Distinct from All American School Bus Corp (Astoria, NY).
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$1.1M rev, 23 employees) family-led NJ operator in core Summit Northeast footprint. Likely too small for a standalone deal but could be a route-acquisition tuck-in for an existing NJ branch.

name: E-Fficient School TRNSPRTN LLC
recent_news: Independent MN operator founded 2013 by Kamaal Seeroo; ~39 power units / 40 drivers per FMCSA (2025). Active, growing Type III + special-ed transportation provider; relocated/headquartered Spring Lake Park MN (Coon Rapids address is registered agent/owner).
fit_notes: Founder-led (Seeroo), still relatively young (~12 yrs), strong SPED/McKinney-Vento niche across Twin Cities metro. Younger owner suggests lower succession urgency, but specialized SPED book and 15+ district footprint make it an attractive growth-platform tuck-in in MN.

name: Lion Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Baltimore City or Anne Arundel County (Brooklyn/Curtis Bay area)
recent_news: No public web presence located; not listed in Maryland School Bus Contractors Assoc., HCPSS, Charles County, or Cecil County contractor rosters reviewed. Confirmed only via address/phone-directory records.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$1.07M rev, 24 employees) Brooklyn/Baltimore-area operator with no traceable web presence; ownership/principal unknown. Diligence would require direct outreach to confirm operator status and any Baltimore City Schools/MTA contracts.

name: Dockendorf Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Watkins-area / central MN school district (route served by 4.0 since March 2021)
recent_news: ACQUIRED: Ron & Mary Dockendorf sold the business to 4.0 School Services (MN-based operator serving 23+ districts) in 2021 after 40 years of ownership; 4.0 began running the route March 1, 2021. FMCSA registration data outdated since 2012 (7 power units / 7 drivers).
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET — already rolled up into 4.0 School Services in 2021. 4.0 itself (MN operator across ~24 districts) could be of interest as a larger regional consolidator; route here is single-school, ~7 buses, no independent value.
